inputs.label: Pressure (inHg)
inputs.businessContext: The measured pressure in inches of mercury.

businessContext_i18n.en: The measured pressure in inches of mercury.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der gemessene Druck in Zoll Quecksilbersäule.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pression mesurée en pouces de mercure.
businessContext_i18n.es: La presión medida en pulgadas de mercurio.

inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: Standard conversion factor from inHg to psi (1 inHg = 0.491154 psi).

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard conversion factor from inHg to psi (1 inHg = 0.491154 psi).
businessContext_i18n.tr: inHg'den psi'ye standart dönüşüm faktörü (1 inHg = 0,491154 psi).
businessContext_i18n.de: Standard-Umrechnungsfaktor von inHg in psi (1 inHg = 0,491154 psi).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de conversion standard d'inHg en psi (1 inHg = 0,491154 psi).
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de conversión estándar de inHg a psi (1 inHg = 0.491154 psi).
businessContext_i18n.ar: عامل التحويل القياسي من بوصة زئبق إلى رطل لكل بوصة مربعة (1 بوصة زئبق = 0.491154 رطل لكل بوصة مربعة).

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for rounding the result.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for rounding the result.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen zum Runden des Ergebnisses.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour arrondir le résultat.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de decimales para redondear el resultado.

inputs.label: Altitude (feet)
inputs.businessContext: Altitude above sea level, provided for informational context (not used in conversion).

businessContext_i18n.en: Altitude above sea level, provided for informational context (not used in conversion).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Deniz seviyesinden yükseklik, bilgilendirme amaçlı verilmiştir (dönüşümde kullanılmaz).
businessContext_i18n.de: Höhe über dem Meeresspiegel, zur Information (nicht für die Umrechnung verwendet).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Altitude au-dessus du niveau de la mer, fournie à titre d'information contextuelle (non utilisée dans la conversion).
businessContext_i18n.es: Altitud sobre el nivel del mar, proporcionada para contexto informativo (no se utiliza en la conversión).
businessContext_i18n.ar: الارتفاع عن مستوى سطح البحر، يُقدم للسياق المعلوماتي (لا يُستخدم في التحويل).

inputs.label: Temperature (°F)
inputs.businessContext: Temperature of the mercury column, provided for informational context (not used in standard conversion).

businessContext_i18n.en: Temperature of the mercury column, provided for informational context (not used in standard conversion).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Cıva sütununun sıcaklığı, bilgilendirme amaçlı verilmiştir (standart dönüşümde kullanılmaz).
businessContext_i18n.de: Temperatur der Quecksilbersäule, zur Information (nicht für die Standardumrechnung verwendet).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Température de la colonne de mercure, fournie à titre d'information contextuelle (non utilisée dans la conversion standard).
businessContext_i18n.es: Temperatura de la columna de mercurio, proporcionada para contexto informativo (no se utiliza en la conversión estándar).
businessContext_i18n.ar: درجة حرارة عمود الزئبق، تُقدم للسياق المعلوماتي (لا تُستخدم في التحويل القياسي).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.

rules.message: Decimal places must be between 0 and 10.
